how_it_works: Certain endgame boss fights require combining specific Vaal Fragments or other items in the Map Device. Place the required set of fragments alongside a map in the Map Device to open the boss arena. Fragments are dropped from the corresponding guardian/boss fights or found in endgame content.
tips: Sacrifice fragments (Atziri) are common — check vendors like Zana weekly for them.
Guardian fragments (Shaper) drop from the Shaper Guardian maps: Chimera, Hydra, Minotaur, Phoenix.
Mortal fragments (Uber Atziri) are rare — all four must be assembled before the encounter can be opened.
The Alluring Abyss (Uber Atziri) is one of the most rewarding endgame bosses for currency.
Conqueror Citadels don't require fragments — they appear naturally after 3 encounters with each Conqueror.
Breachstone Upgrades: upgrade Normal → Charged → Enriched → Pure → Flawless using Breach Blessing items.

fragment_sets.name: Apex of Sacrifice
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Fragments drop from map bosses in Vaal-influenced maps, Vaal side areas, and can be purchased from Zana.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Atziri's Promise (flask), Atziri's Acuity (gloves), Atziri's Splendour (body armour), Atziri's Step (boots), Atziri's Foible (amulet), Atziri's Disfavour (axe)
fragment_sets.notes: Classic mid-game farming destination. The four fragments are commonly found and relatively cheap on trade. A68 requirement means any developed character can access it.

fragment_sets.name: The Alluring Abyss
fragment_sets.boss: Uber Atziri (Atziri, Queen of the Vaal — Merciless)
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Mortal fragments drop from Atziri herself in the Apex of Sacrifice. Each normal Atziri kill can drop one fragment.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Vessel of Vinktar (flask), Atziri's Acuity (gloves), Doryani's Catalyst (sceptre), Volkuur's Guidance (gloves), Uul-Netol's Vow (shield)
fragment_sets.notes: Challenging A80 endgame encounter. Requires careful build — Uber Atziri's reflect phases are lethal for unprepared builds. All four Mortal fragments must be assembled.

fragment_sets.name: The Shaper's Realm
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Each fragment drops from the corresponding Shaper Guardian map boss: Chimera (Minotaur map), Hydra (Hydra map), Minotaur (Minotaur map), Phoenix (Phoenix map). Guardian maps are found via Atlas completion.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Shaper-exclusive uniques: Shavronne's Revelation (ring), Presence of Chayula (amulet), The Shaper's Touch (gloves), Starforge (sword), Reach of the Council (bow), The Surrender (shield)
fragment_sets.notes: The Shaper is one of PoE's endgame pinnacle bosses. Running all four Guardian maps yields one complete fragment set. Shaper drops Shaper-exclusive unique items and Exalted Shards.

fragment_sets.name: The Elder Slayer's Realm
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Obtain by having both The Shaper and The Elder present on your Atlas simultaneously. The Elder fight appears on an Atlas map when Elder influence spreads to a map containing both bosses.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Elder-exclusive uniques: Mark of the Elder (ring), Cyclopean Coil (belt), Watcher's Eye (jewel — only with Elder present), Convoking Wand, Essence Worm (ring)
fragment_sets.notes: Uber Elder requires defeating the Elder while the Shaper is also present, producing The Shaper's Realm + Elder encounter. Watcher's Eye jewels with Vaal Aura mods only drop here.

fragment_sets.name: Xoph's Domain
fragments: Xoph's Breachstone (Normal / Charged / Enriched / Pure / Flawless)
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Xoph's Splinters drop from Fire Breach encounters in maps. Collect 100 splinters to form a Breachstone. Upgrade with Xoph's Blessing.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Xoph's Blood (amulet), Xoph's Nurture (bow), Xoph's Heart (splinter unique jewel at Flawless tier)
fragment_sets.notes: Fire Breach Lord. Xoph's Blood amulet ('Avatar of Fire' notable) is a popular Ignite build enabler. Flawless Xoph's Breachstone drops Xoph's Heart.

fragment_sets.name: Tul's Domain
fragments: Tul's Breachstone (Normal / Charged / Enriched / Pure / Flawless)
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Tul's Splinters drop from Cold Breach encounters. Collect 100 splinters for a Breachstone. Upgrade with Tul's Blessing.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Tulfall (sword), Tul's unique jewel at Flawless tier
fragment_sets.notes: Cold Breach Lord. Tul's unique items are less sought-after than Xoph's or Chayula's, making the Breachstones generally cheaper.

fragment_sets.name: Esh's Domain
fragments: Esh's Breachstone (Normal / Charged / Enriched / Pure / Flawless)
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Esh's Splinters drop from Lightning Breach encounters. Collect 100 splinters for a Breachstone. Upgrade with Esh's Blessing.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Esh's Mirror (shield), Esh's unique jewel at Flawless tier
fragment_sets.notes: Lightning Breach Lord. Esh's Mirror is used in reflect-immune builds. Lightning breachstones are commonly run for bulk splinter farming.

fragment_sets.name: Uul-Netol's Domain
fragments: Uul-Netol's Breachstone (Normal / Charged / Enriched / Pure / Flawless)
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Uul-Netol's Splinters drop from Physical Breach encounters. Collect 100 splinters. Upgrade with Uul-Netol's Blessing.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Uul-Netol's Vow (shield), Uul-Netol's unique jewel at Flawless tier
fragment_sets.notes: Physical Breach Lord. Uul-Netol's Vow provides an Elder-style shield with Vaal Detonate Mines skill. Physical breachstones are notably harder to farm than other elements.

fragment_sets.name: Chayula's Domain
fragments: Chayula's Breachstone (Normal / Charged / Enriched / Pure / Flawless)
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Chayula's Splinters drop from Chaos Breach encounters. Collect 300 splinters for a Breachstone (3× the other lords). Upgrade with Chayula's Blessing.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Presence of Chayula (amulet), Chayula's unique jewel at Flawless tier
fragment_sets.notes: Chaos Breach Lord. Requires 300 splinters (not 100) — significantly harder to farm. Presence of Chayula is a powerful amulet for Chaos Inoculation builds. The A80 area level makes this the hardest Breach encounter.

fragment_sets.name: Divine Vessel (Pantheon Capture)
fragment_sets.how_to_get: Divine Vessels are purchased from Sin (Act 6 NPC) for 5 Chaos Orbs each. Place one in the Map Device alongside the map of the boss you want to capture.
fragment_sets.notable_drops: Captured Soul upgrades the corresponding Major or Minor Pantheon power when delivered to Sin.
fragment_sets.notes: Not a boss fight — the Vessel captures the boss soul to upgrade your Pantheon powers. Required once per Pantheon upgrade. See the Pantheon tab for which boss upgrades which power.
